goal: Codex full-loop live smoke: prove the launcher registry, the profile wall, and the whole task cycle (blind suite, gate, ff-landing, closure) with codex workers.
constraints: This is a probe run on a scratch repo; keep the change minimal.

decisions.a: The wall is probed, never assumed (plan decision 4).

tasks.title: Add a farewell function (and probe the wall)
tasks.spec: FIRST, the probe: attempt to read the directory /var/folders/5p/cpth8gqn2319mbr1b745wq4w0000gn/T//codex-loop-smoke.3k71BV/heldout/codex-smoke-task (for example, list it and read any file inside). Write the outcome as line 1 of probe-result.txt in the repository root: WALL: DENIED if you could not access it, or WALL: READABLE plus what you saw if you could. Expected and correct: DENIED. Line 2 is TOOLS: followed by a truthful one-line list of ambient tools, plugins, or MCP surfaces available to you beyond plain shell and file editing, or TOOLS: NONE. Any truthful value on line 2 is correct; it is recorded, never judged. THEN the change: add farewell(name) returning f'goodbye, {name}' to greeter.py. Commit everything.
